title: rubus holochlorus
intro: Rubus holochlorus, also known as the White Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus holochlorus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus holochlorus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
